name: Aurelian Compact
description: A treaty-driven industrial federation controlling major shipyards.

name: Nyx Shadow Exchange
description: A covert market alliance of smugglers, hackers, and brokers.

name: Krynn War Synod
description: Militarist coalition optimized for fleet pressure and territorial assaults.

name: Helion Science Directorate
description: Research supremacists focused on exotic materials and high-tier technologies.

name: Veil Trade Union
description: Merchant blocs that dominate interstellar logistics and contracts.

name: Singularity Concord
description: Post-biological polity governed by audited strategic AI assemblies and machine-right treaties.
